2606.09887.title: SocraticPO: Policy Optimization via Interactive Guidance
2606.09887.paper_summary: Reinforcement learning (RL) for large language models usually supervises reasoning with scalar outcome rewards, such as binary correctness. Such rewards provide an optimization direction but rarely explain how a model should revise its mistaken reasoning, which can encourage shortcut learning and brittle policies. We propose \textbf{SocraticPO} (Socratic Policy Optimization), a policy-optimization framework that augments RL rollouts with Socratic-style natural-language guidance. During rollout, the student first answers independently; if the answer is incorrect, a teacher diagnoses the attempt and provides concise corrective guidance, after which the student continues under the expanded context. Crucially, this guidance is paired with reward decay: correct answers obtained after teacher intervention only receive decayed rewards, preventing the policy from treating teacher help as a free path to reward. Since SocraticPO only modifies the rollout process while leaving the standard expected-reward objective intact, it can be plugged into existing policy-gradient backends such as Reinforce++. Moreover, because the teacher provides only text-level guidance, SocraticPO can leverage stronger black-box teacher models without requiring access to logits or distribution matching. On undergraduate-level scientific reasoning benchmarks from SciKnowEval, SocraticPO improves over strong RL and self-distillation baselines. Ablations show that both targeted guidance and reward decay are necessary, with reward decay mitigating reliance on assisted correction.
2606.09887.paper_summary_zh: 強化學習（RL）對於大型語言模型通常使用標量結果獎勵來監督推理，例如二元正確性。這樣的獎勵提供了一個優化方向，但很少解釋模型應該如何修正其錯誤的推理，這可能會促進捷徑學習和脆弱的政策。我們提出了\textbf{SocraticPO}（蘇格拉底政策優化），這是一個政策優化框架，通過蘇格拉底風格的自然語言指導來增強RL的回合。在回合中，學生首先獨立回答；如果答案不正確，教師會診斷嘗試並提供簡潔的修正指導，然後學生在擴展的上下文中繼續。關鍵是，這種指導與獎勵衰減相結合：在教師干預後獲得的正確答案僅獲得衰減獎勵，防止政策將教師的幫助視為獲得獎勵的免費途徑。由於SocraticPO僅修改回合過程，同時保持標準的期望獎勵目標不變，因此可以插入現有的政策梯度後端，如Reinforce++。此外，由於教師僅提供文本級指導，SocraticPO可以利用更強的黑箱教師模型，而不需要訪問logits或分佈匹配。在來自SciKnowEval的本科級科學推理基準上，SocraticPO在強大的RL和自我蒸餾基準上有所改善。消融實驗顯示，針對性指導和獎勵衰減都是必要的，獎勵衰減減少了對輔助修正的依賴。
2606.09887.author: Zirui Liu et.al.
2606.09887.authors: Zirui Liu, Jie Ouyang, Qi Liu, Xianquan Wang, Jiayu Liu, Tingyue Pan, Qingchuan Li, Jing Sha, Zhenya Huang, Shijin Wang, Enhong Chen
